ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the part */,
  "part_description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "part_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the part */,
  "part_variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variant of the part */,
  "part_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the part is stored */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the part */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the part */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the part */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the part was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the part was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_part_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_variant_id") REFERENCES part_variants ("part_variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_part_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_type_id") REFERENCES part_types ("part_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_part_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_location_id") REFERENCES part_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_types" (
  "part_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part type */,
  "part_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the part type */,
  "part_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the part type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the part type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_variants" (
  "part_variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part variant */,
  "part_variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the part variant */,
  "part_variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the part variant */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the part variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the location is situated */,
  "aisle" TEXT /* Aisle number of the location */,
  "shelf" TEXT /* Shelf number of the location */,
  "bin" TEXT /* Bin number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_locations_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being tracked */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the part is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the part in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last checked */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date and time when the part was last restocked */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES part_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being used */,
  "assembly_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly line where the part is used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was used */,
  "production_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_usage_production_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_order_id") REFERENCES production_orders ("production_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_usage_assembly_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_line_id") REFERENCES assembly_lines ("assembly_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_usage_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_lines" (
  "assembly_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly line */,
  "assembly_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly line */,
  "assembly_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly line */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the assembly line is situated */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the assembly line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_lines_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES part_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, canceled) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the part */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being revised */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number of the part */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the revision */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_revisions_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., assembly worker, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the part */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, order) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, manual) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_documents_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_orders" (
  "production_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production order */,
  "assembly_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly line where the order is being produced */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "production_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production order the item belongs to */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being produced */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part being produced */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_production_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_order_id") REFERENCES production_orders ("production_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)
